items.title: WATCH:  The real people behind Bad Bunny’s big performance
items.description: Bad Bunny incorporated real-life figures and cultural heroes into his Super Bowl performance, celebrating Puerto Rican and Latin American influence in...

items.title: WATCH:  Seahawks meet a mouse at Disneyland
items.description: Fresh off their Super Bowl win, a couple of players from the Seahawks take part in a 40-year-old tradition at Disneyland.

items.title: 'Democrats are on offense': House Dems' campaign arm adds 5 seats to target list
items.description: The DCCC said its targeting seats in Minnesota, Colorado and elsewhere.

items.title: WATCH:  California surfer swept out to sea survives by clinging to lobster trap buoy
items.description: A rescue team swam out and brought him back to shore after he was spotted by drone a quarter of a mile off shore.

items.title: WATCH:  Small plane makes emergency landing on busy intersection in Georgia
items.description: The plane hit three vehicles, but remarkably no one was severely hurt during the incident.
